content: {"file": "backend/scripts/setup_notion_database.py", "summary": "This script creates a Notion database named 'StoryForge Epics' with specific properties and prints the resulting database ID. It requires NOTION_API_KEY and NOTION_PARENT_PAGE_ID to be set in the environment.", "rules": [{"name": "CreateNotionDatabase", "description": "Creates a new Notion database with predefined properties under a specified parent page.", "conditions": ["NOTION_API_KEY is configured", "NOTION_PARENT_PAGE_ID is configured"], "actions": ["Instantiate AsyncClient with NOTION_API_KEY", "Call client.databases.create to create the database", "Print the created database ID"]}], "dependencies": ["notion_client.AsyncClient", "config.settings"]}
